series_metadata.series_title: FTA Funded Program Vehicle and Equipment Projects
series_metadata.series_description: Grant File: Application, score sheet(s), copy of contract, invoice, vendor payment, any correspondence regarding vehicle, vehicle review reports, disposition approval. This applies to all vehicle and/or equipment projects funded under the FTA.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned into electronic format then destroy paper. ; Electronic: Retain in electronic format for 3 years after disposition of equipment (including rolling stock) is granted., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
